decisions.cat1_intent_fidelity: 2 decisions: A-accepted (update frontmatter description to be more specific about active nature — pre-flight checklist, health scripts, warning gates), B-accepted (add explicit Done-when criteria at end of skill defining successful session-begin)
decisions.cat2_workflow_sequencing: 4 decisions: A-accepted (remove duplicate ROADMAP.md read in Section 3), B-accepted (remove Section 10 incident documentation — misplaced mid-session guidance), C-accepted (consolidate sub-sections into 3 logical phases with clean numbering), D-rejected (no fast-path option — user prefers full checklist every time)
decisions.cat3_input_output: 3 decisions: A-accepted (add session-begin summary template with consistent format — session number, branch, script results table, warnings, tech debt, next goals), B-accepted (specify session number announcement after counter increment), C-deferred (persist script results to state file — over-engineering for now, revisit if session-end needs it)
decisions.cat4_decision_points: 3 decisions: A-accepted (add goal-selection prompt after surfacing next goals — reference the surfaced goals instead of open-ended question), B-accepted (add script failure escalation to user — fix now/defer/ignore), C-accepted (make stale doc remediation a user decision instead of auto-update)
decisions.cat5_integration_surface: 3 decisions: A-accepted (remove episodic memory section 0c entirely — MCP tool doesn't exist), B-accepted (add Integration section with neighbor listing and handoff contract to session-end/checkpoint/alerts), C-accepted (add lightweight compaction resilience — check counter before incrementing to prevent double-increment after compaction)
decisions.cat6_guard_rails: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add scope explosion guard — if 3+ scripts failed or 3+ actionable findings, present triage list), B-accepted (add time/attention budget — session-begin should complete in under 5 minutes, defer extended remediation), C-accepted (add branch validation — verify SESSION_CONTEXT.md branch matches git branch), D-accepted (add disengagement protocol — user says skip/let's work, stop and present completed vs remaining)
decisions.cat7_prompt_engineering: 3 decisions: A-accepted (extract Sections 4, 5, 6 to REFERENCE.md — ~90 lines of reference material that dilutes the checklist), B-accepted (standardize to MUST/SHOULD/MAY hierarchy replacing MANDATORY/AUTOMATIC/RECOMMENDED), C-accepted (add counter-increment guard at point of use — verify not already incremented)
decisions.cat8_scope_boundaries: 2 decisions: A-accepted (rewrite When to Use/When NOT to Use with specific alternatives — alerts, session-end, checkpoint), B-accepted (define SessionStart hook boundary — what hook does vs what skill does, skip if hook already completed)
decisions.cat9_institutional_memory: 3 decisions: A-accepted (remove hardcoded stale references — INTEGRATED_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN archive date, Session #138 header), B-accepted (update version history to 2.0 for audit rewrite), C-accepted (REFERENCE.md should reference CLAUDE.md sections instead of duplicating content)
decisions.cat10_user_experience: 3 decisions: A-accepted (add warm-up announcement — Session #N pre-flight on branch, sets expectations), B-accepted (add progress markers during script execution — phase-level not per-script), C-accepted (add closure signal — Session #N pre-flight complete with stats)
decisions.phase2_5_operational: 1 decision: OPS-A-accepted (fix override-log.jsonl path from .claude/state/ to .claude/ — S2 wrong path, data exists but never consumed)
decisions.phase3_crosscheck: 2 decisions: SC-A-accepted (add decision-point discovery question to skill-creator), SC-B-accepted (add guard rail checklist to skill-creator planning phase)

process_compliance_notes: Cat1-B and Cat10-A initially MISSING during self-audit, fixed in-phase before completion
files_modified: .claude/skills/skill-creator/REFERENCE.md (2 new discovery questions: decision points + guard rail checklist)
skill_creator_gap_details: No discovery question for user decision points — FIXED
No guard rail checklist in planning phase — FIXED
learnings: Checklist skills easily drift into 'run at the user' mode with no decision points — Cat4 was 4/10. Skill-creator now prompts for decision points explicitly.

Reference material duplicated from CLAUDE.md is the #1 bloat source — 90 lines (22%) of session-begin was duplicated content. Extraction to REFERENCE.md is the highest-impact prompt engineering change.
Operational dependency checks caught a real bug (override-log.jsonl wrong path) that wouldn't have been found by category-level audit alone.
